full_text: Privacy Policy Last Updated: December 29, 2025 This Privacy Policy explains how Valnet Inc., a corporation incorporated under the laws of Canada, having its head office at 7405 Transcanada Highway, Suite 100, Saint-Laurent, Quebec H4T 1Z2, and/or its subsidiaries (collectively “Valnet ”, “ us ” or “we”), collects, uses and protects your personal information, which we may collect from you or that you may provide when you visit any of our websites, including https://www.valnetinc.com/ and other digital properties that link to this Privacy Policy (our “Website(s)”) or otherwise use our Website(s) or applications (collectively referred to as services the “Services”). This Privacy Policy does not apply to : Information we may collect from you offline; or information collected by any third-party, including through any application or content (including advertising) that may link to or be accessible from or through the Websites. Payment Information Processed by third-parties. Certain Services ...
